name: Autumn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a muffin pan with nonstick spray or line the cups with paper baking cups. Set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, oat bran, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg.
3. In a large bowl, mix together sugar, applesauce, egg whites, and vanilla. Stir in pumpkin. Add the dry ingredients and stir quickly until combined. Fold in granola, raisins, and apples.
4. Fill each muffin cup about three-quarters full with batter. Sprinkle a small amount of brown sugar and granola on top of each muffin, pressing gently into the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool muffins on a wire rack for 5 minutes before removing them from the pan to finish cooling.
